turns.content: I've been having thoughts that it would be easier if I wasn't here anymore.
I'm really glad you shared that with me. Those thoughts can feel very isolating. Are you having thoughts of hurting yourself?
Not like a plan or anything. It's more like... I'm just so tired of everything being hard.
